# Phase 2d / Phase 8 baseline — SDL3 DOS-backend display+audio info
# Source: build/sdl3-smoke/sdltest.exe (tests/sdl3-smoke/sdltest.c)
# Host:   DOSBox-X under tools/dosbox-x.conf (cycles=fixed 40000,
#         memsize=48, VESA modelist=compatible, SB16 IRQ 5 / DMA 1,5).
#         NOT real ATI Mach64 / M64VBE. Phase 8 engineer compares
#         this against the same probe run on g2k to flag VESA / SB
#         backend drift between PR #15377 in DOSBox-X and real HW.
# Regenerate: make sdl3-smoke

SDLTEST-BEGIN: doskutsu Phase 2d smoke (SDL3 3.5.0)
AUDIO-DRIVERS: count=3
AUDIO-DRIVER: 0 soundblaster
AUDIO-DRIVER: 1 disk
AUDIO-DRIVER: 2 dummy
AUDIO-INIT: OK
AUDIO-CURRENT: soundblaster
AUDIO-DEVICES-playback: count=1
DEVICE-playback: 0 System audio playback device
AUDIO-DEVICES-recording: count=0
VIDEO-DRIVER: vesa
VIDEO-DISPLAYS: count=1
DISPLAY: 1 name=DOSBox - The DOS Emulator bounds=640x480@0,0
MODE-CURRENT: 1 640x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB8888
MODES: 1 count=34
MODE: 1 0 1280x1024 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 1 1152x864 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 2 1152x864 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 3 1152x864 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 4 1024x768 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 5 1024x768 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 6 1024x768 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 7 800x600 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB8888
MODE: 1 8 800x600 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 9 800x600 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 10 800x600 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 11 640x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB8888
MODE: 1 12 640x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 13 640x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 14 640x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 15 640x400 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB8888
MODE: 1 16 640x400 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 17 640x400 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 18 640x400 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 19 512x384 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 20 512x384 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 21 400x300 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 22 400x300 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 23 320x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 24 320x480 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 25 320x400 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 26 320x240 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB8888
MODE: 1 27 320x240 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 28 320x240 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 29 320x240 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
MODE: 1 30 320x200 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB8888
MODE: 1 31 320x200 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_RGB565
MODE: 1 32 320x200 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_XRGB1555
MODE: 1 33 320x200 0.00Hz fmt=SDL_PIXELFORMAT_INDEX8
SDLTEST-END: rc=0 audio=0 video=0
